series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of records related to the cemetery grant program, which include, but are not limited to the following: cemetery grant applications, documentation included with the application, award letters, final reports filed with the Division and any related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records are imaged and indexed into a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that the paper record was imaged and indexed properly, then the paper record is shredded. ; Electronic: Any records maintained in machine readable format are to be retained 3 years from the date the final accounting report is filed with the Division. Then, any machine readable records are to be deleted. ; Microform: Any records maintained in microform are to be retained 3 years from the date the final accounting report is filed with the Division. Then, any microform records are to be shredded., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
